_comment: Illustrative LLM output. Actual job statements will vary.

jtbd.jtbd_summary: The core job is: when leading a team through concurrent projects, provide a single source of truth that eliminates the need to ask for status updates or write manual reports — so the team lead can maintain control and credibility without administrative overhead. Secondary jobs focus on anticipating blockers before they escalate and maintaining a professional reputation for delivery with both their team and their manager.

functional_jobs.job: When starting the week, I want to see my entire team's work status in one view, so I can prioritise my time without sending status request messages
When presenting to my manager or stakeholders, I want to show concrete evidence of team output, so I can demonstrate that the team is delivering value
functional_jobs.current_solution: Manual status email or spreadsheet extract

functional_jobs.job: When handing off a project mid-sprint, I want to transfer full context without losing any in-flight state, so the next person can continue without a handoff meeting
When moving fast, I want to retain an audit trail of what happened, so I can reconstruct decisions if something goes wrong

emotional_jobs.job: Feel in control of the project even when working remotely or off-site
emotional_jobs.product_implication: Mobile app must support the full status-check flow — not just read-only access

emotional_jobs.job: Feel relief from the administrative burden of writing status updates
emotional_jobs.product_implication: Auto-generated status summaries or digest emails that eliminate the need to manually compose updates

emotional_jobs.job: Feel confident that dependency risks are visible before they cause a missed deadline
emotional_jobs.product_implication: Dependency alerts and risk notifications must be proactive, not reactive

social_jobs.job: Be perceived as organised and on top of things by their direct team, even during chaotic sprints
social_jobs.product_implication: The product's UI itself should reinforce a sense of order — clear visual hierarchy of project health, no clutter

social_jobs.job: Be perceived as accountable and delivery-focused by their manager and leadership stakeholders
social_jobs.product_implication: Export and reporting features are social proof tools — they exist to help the team lead demonstrate credibility upward

pain_points.pain: Writing status updates manually is a recurring, low-value task that interrupts actual project work
Dependency failures surface too late — discovered only when a deadline is missed
Project handoff loses context — the new owner starts from scratch or needs a 1-hour sync

meta.source: Customer interviews — switching and onboarding study, July 2026
